steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Start with $p = \sqrt{12c} - 25$. Add 25 to both sides: $p + 25 = \sqrt{12c}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, $c=\frac{(p+25)^{2}}{12}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
